creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Apr 29 21:11:04 2014
New Revision: 352651
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352651
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352651/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/189114
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/pkg-descr

Modified: head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:10:58 2014	(r352650)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/Makefile	Tue Apr 29 21:11:04 2014	(r352651)
@@ -8,9 +8,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Remove accents from a string
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USES=		iconv perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 CFLAGS+=	-DICONV_CONST=const

Modified: head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 21:10:58 2014	(r352650)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Text-Unaccent/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 29 21:11:04 2014	(r352651)
@@ -3,5 +3,4 @@ converts the input string from the speci
 unac_string_utf16 to return the unaccented equivalent. The conversion from 
 and to UTF-16 is done with iconv(1).
 
-Author: Loic Dachary <loic@senga.org>
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Text-Unaccent/
